newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9, 2026. CAREL published its 2025 ESG Highlights (June 12) and a food-retail energy-efficiency white paper (June 19) - both immaterial to fundamentals. The data-center liquid-cooling controls (CDU/immersion, Redfish) thesis is intact but no new contract or guidance datapoint. Stock -1.7% since June 9.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent-node lens fits CAREL well (still perceived as HVAC/refrigeration despite real datacenter liquid-cooling controls/CDU/immersion exposure). No material catalyst since June 9, so the high-conviction latent thesis is unchanged - hold at 8.
verdicts.bull: Under-recognized datacenter cooling-controls intelligence layer; CDU/immersion/Redfish products growing.
verdicts.neutral: Genuine but small-cap exposure; still mostly valued as HVAC/refrigeration automation.
verdicts.bear: Datacenter is a minority of mix; no fresh contract to confirm the latent re-rate.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Datacenter exposure stays minority of mix
